# Popcorn

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Popcorn;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Popcorn { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
cinema, movies, films, salted, sweet, sugar, candy, snack

## Categories
food-beverage, multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/popcorn)
